diagrams.title: CPU Scheduling Criteria Overview
diagrams.description: Five main scheduling criteria and their relationships
diagrams.purpose: Understand what each criterion measures and how they differ

diagrams.title: Process State Transition with Scheduling Points
diagrams.description: Shows how processes move between states and when scheduling decisions occur

diagrams.title: Turnaround Time Components
